locations.name: Phillip Parker King
locations.summary: Phillip Parker King (13 December 1791 – 26 February 1856) was an early explorer of the Australian and Patagonian coasts.

locations.name: 圣地亚哥首都大区
locations.summary: 圣地亚哥首都大区（西班牙語：Región Metropolitana de Santiago）位于智利中部，辖圣地亚哥省、查卡布科省、科迪勒拉省、马伊波省、梅利皮亞省、塔拉甘特省等省，面积15,403平方公里，人口6,061,185。首府…

locations.name: 湖大区
locations.summary: 湖大区（西班牙語：X Región de Los Lagos）是智利由北至南的第14个大区，由四个省组成：奥索尔诺省、延基韦省、奇洛埃省和帕莱纳省。大区中有智利第二大岛奇洛埃岛（Chiloé）和第二大湖延基韦湖（Lake Llanquih…

locations.name: 艾森大区
locations.summary: 艾森大區，全稱伊瓦涅斯将军艾森大区（西班牙語：Región Aysén del General Carlos Ibáñez del Campo）是智利从北到南的第15个大区。首府科伊艾克。本大區也是目前智利人口最少的大區，僅約9萬人多。

relations.subject: Slender-billed parakeet
relations.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Enicognathus leptorhynchus |volume=2022 |article-number=e.T22685891A208980485 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22685891A208980485.en |access-date=15 March 2023}} | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Enicognathus | species = leptorhynchus | authority = (King, 1831) | range_map = Enicognathus leptorhynchus map.svg | range_map_caption = Approximate range in green | synonyms = Enicognathus byroni }} The slender-billed parakeet (Enicognathus leptorhynchus) or choroy, is a species of bird in subfamily Arinae of the family Psittacidae, the African and New World parrots

relations.subject: Slender-billed parakeet
relations.evidence: The slender-billed parakeet is endemic to central Chile between the Santiago Metropolitan Region and Los Lagos Region; it also occurs in the Aysén Region, but rarely, and has been recorded as a vagrant in Argentina.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Slender-billed parakeet
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. Though its population declined in the 1950s and 1960s due to deforestation and other causes, it is still considered fairly common
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
